data.body:
## Description

In `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-compact.sh`:
1. Move the file listing (`mapfile -t event_files`, currently line 99) INSIDE the flock section. Keep a pre-flock count as a cheap optimization gate to avoid acquiring the lock when clearly below threshold.
2. Inside flock: re-list files, re-check count vs threshold, compile state, write SNAPSHOT, delete files, commit.
3. Add `--skip-sync` flag that bypasses the sync-before-compact precondition (lines 67-84). When --skip-sync is passed, skip both the sync call AND the remote SNAPSHOT check (lines 86-93), since compact-on-close doesn't need either.

## File Impact
- Modify: `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-compact.sh`

## TDD Requirement (GREEN)
Task 1 tests go GREEN. Existing compact tests remain GREEN (behavioral contract unchanged for non-skip-sync paths).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] All compact tests pass including new skip-sync tests
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-compact.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] --skip-sync flag accepted without error
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-compact.sh nonexistent --skip-sync 2>&1 | grep -qv 'unknown argument'
